text: I feel so anxious about everything
My anxiety is through the roof today
I cannot stop worrying about what might happen
I am really nervous about the interview
Work has me completely stressed out
I am overwhelmed and under so much pressure
Too many deadlines I cannot handle
I feel burned out from studying
I feel so alone even around people
Nobody understands me
I have no one to talk to
I miss having real connection
I am exhausted and drained
I have no energy left
I could sleep for a week
Emotionally I feel empty and tired
I am scared something bad will happen
I am afraid of failing
The future terrifies me
I feel frightened and on edge
